Name: Intake Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Initial project application received and intake screening complete.

Name: Screening Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Categorical Exclusion screening completed; no extraordinary circumstances identified.

Name: Analysis Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Informal agency consultation with resource staff completed.

Name: CE Determination Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Categorical Exclusion determination finalized by Authorized Officer.

Name: Decision Issued
nepa_event_description__c: Decision Record issued; project approved under CE.
